research.goalTemplate: Research {what}. Read README.md and any upstream source files needed. Capture raw notes for a structured brief.

execute.goalTemplate: Produce the structured research brief for {what}. Read notes.md and upstream sources. Write brief.json with shape {"findings":[{"claim":string,"source_event_id":string}],"sources":[string]}. Each finding's claim must be substantive and carry a source_event_id traceable to evidence.

review.goalTemplate: Review {what}. Read notes.md and brief.json. Write review.md noting whether each claim is sourced and whether the brief is fit to accept.
